## Checklist

- [ ] Every factual claim has a reference link to an official source
- [ ] I've checked the dev server (`npm run start`) and the page renders correctly
- [ ] "Last verified" date is set at the top of any updated content page
- [ ] Changelog section is updated at the bottom of any updated content page
- [ ] No placeholder TODOs left (or remaining ones are clearly marked for follow-up)
